body_txt: Limited Wardrobe taken to its logical extreme. This is when a character flashes back to their childhood (or just their "younger days"), or the work shows a scene from the character's future, and they're wearing the exact same (or almost exact) style of clothes that they wear in the present. If enough time (or great enough changes in fashion) is involved, it may also be an Outdated Outfit . Can be Truth in Television for some individual items of clothing, if they're expensive and durable and/or have some sentimental value. Compare Weapon Jr. .
